prompt: Wide photograph of a finished composite-deck railing rebuild on a North Andover MA backyard deck — second-story deck level, dark-grey composite decking boards, top rail in matching dark-grey composite, white aluminum balusters spaced evenly. Stairs descending camera-right with the same railing system. Backyard mature maple trees beyond, late-afternoon golden light skimming the rail caps. High-contrast, slightly desaturated photography, working-contractor documentary catalog feel — NOT HGTV bright, NOT luxury hotel-staged, NOT real-estate photographer brightness. The lighting in a Snap-On distributor's tool room. No people in frame, no readable text anywhere, no logos, no brand names visible.
